items.title: Form Basics
items.code:
<form method="post" action="/submit">
  <label>
    Email
    <input name="email" type="email" autocomplete="email" required />
  </label>

  <label>
    Password
    <input name="password" type="password" minlength="8" required />
  </label>

  <button type="submit">Sign in</button>
</form>

items.title: Dataclass
Typing + async
items.code:
from typing import Any

async def fetch_json(url: str) -> dict[str, Any]:
    import aiohttp
    async with aiohttp.ClientSession() as s:
        async with s.get(url) as r:
            r.raise_for_status()
            return await r.json()

items.title: Quickstart (module + run)
items.code:
mkdir my-go && cd my-go
go mod init example.com/my-go
cat > main.go <<'EOF'
package main

import "fmt"

func main() { fmt.Println("hello") }
EOF

go run .

items.title: Quickstart (compile + run)
Project setup (Makefile)
items.code:
CC=cc
CFLAGS=-std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -O2

all: app
app: main.c
	$(CC) $(CFLAGS) main.c -o app
clean:
	rm -f app

items.title: Iteration (numeric for, ipairs, pairs)
items.code:
for i = 1, 3 do
  print(i)
end

local xs = { "a", "b" }
for i, v in ipairs(xs) do
  print(i, v)
end

local m = { a = 1, b = 2 }
for k, v in pairs(m) do
  print(k, v)
end

items.title: SFC (script setup)
items.code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { ref } from "vue";
const n = ref(0);
</script>

<template>
  <button @click="n++">{{ n }}</button>
</template>

items.title: Iteration (v-for)
Computed
items.code:
<script setup lang="ts">
import { computed, ref } from "vue";
const xs = ref([1, 2, 3]);
const sum = computed(() => xs.value.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0));
</script>

<template>
  <output>{{ sum }}</output>
</template>
